W.label: the window · you can see the archery range from here

D.label: the cabin door · out to the path

M.label: a hand-drawn map of the camp taped to the wall · Tessa's handiwork

notes: Cabin Beaver · four campers · Tessa Ansen (the plotter), Marisol Cortez (the natural leader), Danny Broz (the homesick nine-year-old), Reggie Vandermeer (the boat guy).  Bunks in two clusters north and south · a rug in the middle.  Tessa's hand-drawn camp map is taped to the wall.  Door south to the camp path.
